positive: A whimsical, minimalist forest creature silhouette, designed for apparel printing. The subject is a stylized, gentle fox with exaggerated, flowing tail and ears, surrounded by abstract stylized flora and fauna elements like crescent moons, stylized ferns, and delicate glowing orbs. The scene must use a restricted, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blue, warm gold, and crisp cream. The composition should be perfectly centered, with clean, bold lines and negative space around the subject. Flat graphic style, perfect for screen printing or direct-to-garment transfer. Studio background, vector art quality, high contrast, clean silhouettes, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, amateur, photorealistic, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cluttered, messy lines
